subject: Black Mage job-class figure from Final Fantasy Tactics Advance — a robed spellcaster with an enormous wide-brimmed hat obscuring the face
suspected_ip: Black Mage job class (Final Fantasy Tactics Advance)
description: A stocky humanoid figure wears a massive wide-brimmed pointed hat in yellow-amber tones that completely obscures any facial features, leaving only darkness beneath the brim. The figure is clothed in a blue-grey robe with a leather belt at the waist, and carries a gnarled staff in one hand. Colorful magical gems and orbs — red, blue, green, yellow — float throughout the composition, suggesting active spellcasting. The art style is bold-lined and slightly cartoonish, consistent with FFTA's aesthetic. An orange flame burns in the lower foreground. The background is grey-beige with a textured, stone-like quality.
foreground: robed Black Mage figure with enormous hat, staff, floating magical gems
background: grey-beige textured surface, orange flame at lower edge
emotion: forceful forward lean — aggressive magical posture
